steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into the function definition $h(x) = x + b$:

$$h(0) = 0 + b = b$$

steps.title: Use the given condition to find b
steps.content:
The problem states $h(0) = 21$. From Step 1, we found that $h(0) = b$, therefore:

$$b = 21$$
